title: Laursen Supramaximal Sprint Protocol
description: Sprint-based performance improvement for trained cyclists
purpose: Sprint-based performance improvement for trained cyclists

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/12. 75% FTP, Seated. 15:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% for 15:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 175% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:30 at 175%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 175% for 30s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 30s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/12. Power: 175-175%, Cadence: 60-75 rpm, Position: Alternating. Execute.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.
